arts.ttl: ‘We need fresh legs’ - Flick hints at resting Pedri, vows to make changes against Valencia
arts.sum: The Blaugrana have already played a ton of big games this January with pretty much the same starting XI, so it’s natural to wonder if coach Hansi Flick will be making any changes to his team on Sunday’s La Liga clash with relegation candidates Valencia. Flick was asked about potential rotations in a press conference on Saturday, and he confirmed that he indeed plans to make some changes to the team, including resting his best and most important player, midfielder Pedri.

arts.sum: Barcelona are already assured of their place in the last 16 of the Champions League, but a win over Atalanta next week would mean a top 2 finish in the league phase, which would also ensure extra prize money for the financially-struggling Catalan giants. arts.ttl: Mourinho steps in to SAVE Rashford’s Barcelona dream
arts.sum: Mourinho, who is now in charge of Fenerbahce in the Turkish Super Lig, could hold the key to Rashford’s dream of joining Barcelona – despite the Portuguese being a former public enemy No.1 at Camp Nou during his stint as Real Madrid's head coach. Marcus Rashford ’s hopes of leaving Manchester United during the January transfer window could be saved by former Old Trafford boss Jose Mourinho.
